title: Water Service Providers - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Utility Assistance > Water Service Providers 2 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CITY OF PORTLAND CITY OF PORTLAND WATER BUREAU PORTLAND WATER BUREAU CUSTOMER SERVICE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Responsible for billing and collecting charges for services provided by the Portland Water Bureau and the Bureau of Environmental Services. Establishes guidelines for program providing low-income assistance with owner-occupied fixture repair costs and utility bill discount. Refers individuals to community service agencies to determine eligibility. 664 N Tillamook Street Portland, OR 97227 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm Email (503) 823-7770 Get Directions Visit Website More Details EUGENE WATER AND ELECTRIC BOARD Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Electric and water service provider. Fields complaints and calls about utility emergencies. Provides a medical certificate program. May provide assistance or payment plans to customers who are having difficulty paying their utility bills. The Customer Care Program offers a $280 bill credit once per calendar year to eligible customers. 4200 Roosevelt Boulevard Eugene, OR 97402 Eligibility: Electric and water customers: Unrestricted Customer Care Program: EWEB customers that meet income guidelines Hours: Customer Service by phone Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Report power outages and water emergencies 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 685-7000 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CITY OF PORTLAND PORTLAND WATER BUREAU CUSTOMER SERVICE EUGENE WATER AND ELECTRIC BOARD EUGENE WATER AND ELECTRIC BOARD
